summary: Full E2E test of French kindergarten 'ateliers autonomes' app. Backend: 10/10 pytest passed (children/workshops CRUD, admin auth, validations toggle, cascade deletes, overview). Frontend: home grid, child workshops toggle (validate/unvalidate with confetti, optimistic updates, done counter), back nav, admin login flow (wrong + correct pwd), admin add/delete child, add/delete workshop, overview table, sessionStorage persistence on reload, logout — all working.

issues: Tom card (color #BFDBFE) renders with very faded/washed-out look in the screenshot; verify card backgroundColor overrides are not being affected by a global filter — text is still legible but contrast is lower than other cards. Cosmetic only.

critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/validations endpoint does not require admin auth — any client could un-validate. Consider gating behind X-Admin-Password or restricting to teacher device. Acceptable for kindergarten kiosk per spec but worth flagging.
Backend uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'); migrate to lifespan handler for FastAPI >=0.110.
ADMIN_PASSWORD compared in plaintext via header on every admin request; OK for local kindergarten use but not transport-secure if backend exposed publicly without HTTPS (it is HTTPS here).

ChildWorkshopsPage uses window.innerWidth at module-load fallback for Confetti, fine; minor: no error state for failed POST /validations beyond toast (no rollback of optimistic update). Consider reverting state on failure.
test_credentials: Admin password: 'maitresse' (from /app/backend/.env ADMIN_PASSWORD). No /app/memory/test_credentials.md file present.
seed_data_creation: None permanent — TEST_Zoe child and TEST_WS1 workshop were created during testing and cleaned up via the admin UI delete flow. Backend pytest also creates TEST_Zoe/TEST_WS and removes them in test_child_full_crud_and_validation_flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints and frontend routes are working. data-testid attributes follow French names (child-card-Léa, delete-child-Tom, workshop-row-{id}, validate-indicator-{id}). Admin auth uses sessionStorage 'admin_password' + X-Admin-Password header. Confetti fires on validate. Optimistic UI updates on workshop toggle. Backend seed runs only when collections empty (idempotent restart-safe).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. App is in good shape for first iteration.
